testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Admin Navigation to Settings
testCases.notes: Settings module accessible from admin navigation at /#!/workspace. Platform settings available. Dynamic properties management accessible via Settings.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Platform Available
testCases.notes: Admin platform version 3.1025.0. Dynamic properties are a platform-level feature. Feature accessible via Developer tools or Settings module.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Product Custom Attributes in Search
testCases.notes: Custom product attributes visible as facets in search results: VOLUME_ML, SET, MEASURE, BOWL_MATERIAL, PRODUCT_CARE_INSTRUCTIONS, WEIGHT (Suite 004/005 verified). These represent dynamic properties configured per catalog category.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Product Properties in Cart
testCases.notes: Product properties in cart: Brand=NOCCILLI, Brand_Name=NOCCILLI, Classification=Pressure Cookers. Custom properties displayed in cart line items. Dynamic property values rendered in cart Properties column.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Configurable Product Options
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat dynamic properties: 4 configurable sections (Select your fav color, Select print-ready cap, Customize text for your cap, Add photo). Each section represents a configurable product property. Verified in Suite 072.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Text Property Type
testCases.notes: Text input field in Configurable Hat 'Customize text for your cap' section: type=text, maxLength=255. Text-type dynamic property rendered as text input with max length constraint. Verified in CFG-007.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — File Upload Property Type
testCases.notes: File input (type=file) present in 'Add photo' section of Configurable Hat. File-upload type dynamic property rendered as file input. Verified in CFG-008.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Radio/Select Property Type
testCases.notes: Color selection in Configurable Hat: radiogroup with radio inputs for each color option. Select-type dynamic property rendered as radiogroup. Options: Black hat, Beige hat, Green hat, Red hat, None. Verified in CFG-003.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Property Value Pricing
testCases.notes: Each color option has price: Black hat $10.00, Beige hat $500.00, Green hat $18.00, Red hat $14.00. Dynamic property option pricing contributes to product total price. VCST-4713 verified.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Properties in PDP Display
testCases.notes: PDP for Pressure Cooker shows product properties. Configurable Hat shows configurable sections. Dynamic properties rendered on PDP based on property type and configuration.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Catalog Attributes as Search Facets
testCases.notes: CATEGORIES facet and custom attribute facets (BRAND, COLOR, MATERIAL, etc.) in search results. Catalog attributes indexed as searchable/facetable via dynamic properties system.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Developer Tools Access
testCases.notes: Developer tools accessible from admin navigation. GraphiQL available for querying properties via xAPI. Dynamic property schema accessible via introspection.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Configurable Product maxLength Validation
testCases.notes: Per project memory: Text-section maxLength applies to Custom input only, NOT to preset option labels. CFG-007 verified: text input maxLength=255. Preset options serialize by optionId reference (not customText).

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Product Type: Configurable with Optional Sections
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat sections 2-4 are optional ('Personalize your selection further (optional)'). Optional dynamic property sections: Select print-ready cap, Customize text, Add photo. Required vs optional property configuration.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Quantity Spinbutton for Options
testCases.notes: Each color option in Configurable Hat has a quantity spinbutton (disabled, value=1). Quantity per selected option managed at product level. Spinbutton disabled since quantity managed globally.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Image Property for Color Options
testCases.notes: Each color option has associated image: img 'Black hat', img 'Beige hat', img 'Green hat', img 'Red hat'. Image-type property for option visual representation.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — 'None' Option for Optional Properties
testCases.notes: Color radiogroup includes 'None' option (no image label, radio ref=e341). Allows deselecting optional property. None option makes color section effectively optional without requiring separate configuration.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — URL Reference per Option
testCases.notes: Each color option links to separate product URL: Black hat /product/aa8116e5..., Beige hat /product/3cc2ab6e..., Green hat /product/59e78525..., Red hat /product/42ec462f... Options backed by separate product entities.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — VCST-4987 Text Preset Deferred
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Per project memory (project_vcst_4987_pending_updates.md): test-case + BL updates for Text-section preset coverage are DEFERRED until VCST-4987 fix ships. User prefers to write against stable behavior.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Admin Create Dynamic Property
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Creating new dynamic property via admin Settings > Dynamic properties UI deferred. Property creation UI navigation deferred.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Admin Edit Dynamic Property
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Editing existing dynamic property values deferred.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Admin Delete Dynamic Property
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Property deletion deferred to avoid affecting test data.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Admin List Dynamic Properties
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Listing all dynamic properties from admin Settings deferred. Properties verified via product rendering.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Properties per Entity Type
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Dynamic properties can be applied to different entity types (products, orders, contacts). Entity-type filtering in admin deferred.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — xAPI dynamicProperties Query
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: xAPI dynamicProperties query validation via GraphiQL requires admin authentication and dedicated GraphQL test step. Deferred to Suite 050 (GraphQL).

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Admin > API for Property Management
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: REST API for dynamic property CRUD operations deferred to Suite 049 (Platform API).

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Product Properties Display in Admin Catalog
testCases.notes: Catalog module accessible from admin navigation. Products managed via Catalog admin. Properties visible per product in catalog editor.

testCases.title: Dynamic Properties — Configurable Product Admin (Suite 052)
testCases.notes: Configurable products management covered in Suite 052 (Backend). Admin Catalog > Products shows configurable products. Suite 052 covers admin-side CP management.
